title: Theory of Computation Semester-End Examination Preparation Flow
description: A flowchart showing the logical progression of topics and concepts a student should master to prepare for the Theory of Computation final exam, based on Module 5 content.
relationships: Grammars define languages recognized by automata
Turing Machines recognize Recursively Enumerable Languages
Decidability questions are formalized using Turing Machines
Complexity Classes categorize problems by required computational resources
